homepage.title: Industrial Real-Time Location System (RTLS) | Sewio RTLS
homepage.description: Sewio delivers industrial real-time location systems (RTLS) using UWB, BLE and GPS to increase efficiency and safety in manufacturing.
homepage.text_excerpt:
Industrial Real-Time Location System (RTLS) | Sewio RTLS
Skip to content
Home Page 12-2018
Jan Kostak
2026-04-09T12:21:09+00:00
Maximize Your Efficiency With Industrial Real-Time Location System (RTLS)
With
Sewio Real-time Location System (RTLS)
for precise
indoor tracking
, you can transform your business into a highly efficient, powerful and streamlined operation
Using technology based on
ultrawideband (UWB)
, only Sewio gives you the hardware and software you need to gain accurate and actionable data and be
more productive, cost-effective and safe.
Learn More on Sewio RTLS
Get Started
Results Brought to Industry Leaders
Benefit from 7 Use Cases in One Single RTLS Same As Velux Did
Danish Velux knows how to get value from their RTLS! Learn how they are leveraging RTLS to boost ergonomics, efficiency, and safety.
Get the Most From Your RTLS
10x Shorten the Completion of Mustering Like CNRL Did
Discover how CNRL achieved 100% reliability of their mustering system and thus boosted the safety of their team members even in their high-risk environment.
Improve Employee Safety
Reduce Inventory Time by 25% Similarly to Bora Italy
See how Bora Italy leveraged indoor tracking to increase the utilization of their warehouse by 10% and reduce picking time by 15% while completely eliminating errors.
Increase Logistic Productivity
Increase Your Plant’s OEE by 2% Just like Continental Did
Read how RTLS enabled Coninental to improve the efficiency of their equipment and processes and reduce downtime to a minimum.
Reduce Downtime
Accomplish 50% Shorten Lead Time as SEG Automotive Did
Indoor tracking allowed the automation of booking in/out process, leading to saving 15% of employees and shortening the lead time by 50%, from six to three hours.
Shorten Lead Time
Achieve 24% Better System Uptime Like Budweiser Did
See how the Budweiser Budvar brewery achieved 24% system uptime by replacing an RFID powered indoor positioning system by UWB powerd RTLS.
Decrease Costs
Save 20% of Warehouse Space Just Like Volkswagen
Tracking 70 forklifts
and AGV’s brought Volkswagen real-time data needed to improve the utilization of warehouse and decrease the distance traveled.
Boost Efficiency
What Can You Track With Sewio RTLS
ASSET TRACKING
Enhance Productivity
FORKLIFT TRACKING
Boost Your OEE
EMPLOYEE TRACKING
Increase Safety
The Decision-Maker’s Guide to UWB
Get a complete guide to understanding and applying UWB technology in industry.
Download whitepaper
What Customers Say
Thanks to this digitalization project, we were able to reduce safety stock from eight to four hours and finally run a true Just-in-Time operation. The system paid for itself in two years, and we’re only starting to tap into its potential for many more applications.”
Vladimír Strnad
GL project team & digitalization, Toyota Motors
Sewio is one of the most enthusiastic and agile companies I’ve been working with in the IoT space. Our cooperation with Sewio proved their engineering competence and prompt response

about.text:
About Sewio - RTLS manufacturer - Sewio RTLS
Skip to content
About Us
Jan Kostak
2025-09-11T09:27:20+00:00
About Sewio Networks
Sewio Networks is a manufacturer of a
real-time location system (RTLS)
for indoor location tracking that drives business results for manufacturers, warehouses, distribution centers, OEMs and more.
For a detailed explanation of the technology, visit our page on
what RTLS is
Introduction of SEWIO – Real-time location platform
Why does Sewio Exist?
Our Mission
Empowering our partners and customers to achieve greater efficiency and safety by making clever decisions based on the most reliable location data available.
Our Vision
To transform 10,000,000 m² of shop floors into the most efficient and safe environments possible by 2028.
Our Customers
From mid-size organizations to Fortune 500 listed enterprises in the industry, warehousing, and manufacturing verticals.
(See our customers)
Our Partners
System integrators, IoT solution providers, AR/VR engineering companies, WMS integrators and other companies are making up our partner ecosystem.
(See our partners)
Our Tagline
The only RTLS made exclusively for manufacturers
Full real-time visibility
Information for Media
Sewio Product Profile
Sewio Networks is a manufacturer of real-time location system (RTLS) that drives business results for manufacturers, warehouses, distribution centers, OEMs and more. It provides customers and partners a precise, reliable, fully scalable and customer-centric IoT solution for
indoor location tracking
that enables companies to achieve greater efficiency, profitability and safety.
Sewio customers include:
Volkswagen
, Toyota,
Budweiser Budvar
, TPCA,
Škoda
ENEL
Sewio Networks Company Profile
Sewio Networks is a manufacturer of
real-time location system (RTLS)
that drives business results for manufacturers, warehouses, distribution centers, OEMs and more. The Sewio system is built on ultra-wideband technology (UWB) and delivered with RTLS Studio, remote management and visualization software.
It gives partners and customers a precise, easy-to-integrate, reliable and fully scalable IoT solution for
indoor location tracking
that enables companies to achieve greater efficiency, profitability and safety. Founded in 2014, Sewio has offices in USA, UK, Germany and Czechia. Sewio has 80+ system integration partners and powers customers in 45 countries. Sewio customers include:
Volkswagen
, Toyota,
Budweiser Budvar
, TPCA,
Škoda
ENEL
Sewio in Numbers
Sewio technology is used by 300+ clients within 45 countries all over the world
Sewio is delivered through a network of 100+ partners in 45 countries
Sewio has a team of 40+ employees in six countries – USA, Germany, Spain, Slovenia, Slovakia and the Czech Republic
The average payback period (PBP) for Sewio technology in intralogistics is 11 months
“SEWIO“ is a word trademark registered at EU IPO under nr. 018754885.

Our E-shop Has Been Discontinued
The e-commerce section of our website is no longer active.
While we’ve decided to discontinue online purchases, selected products remain available upon request.
If you’re interested in the
Indoor Tracking RTLS UWB Wi-Fi Kit
or the
Open Sniffer
, we’ll be happy to provide you with more information or prepare a custom quote.
Please reach out to us using the form on our
Contact page
, and a member of our team will get back to you shortly.
Thank you for your understanding and continued interest in our technology.
